2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

778 JOUR - Journalism

JOUR735 Salzburg Seminar. Global Change, Global Cooperation (3 Credits)

Practical and theoretical examination of a global problem (or problems) of contemporary importance from a cross-cultural, perspective. Analytical framework used to examine how media shape global problems, events and/or issues regionally.

Restriction: Must be in Salzburg Academy program. Jointly offered with JOUR435.
